description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a prominent cylindrical tower element at the front, featuring a mix of wood, concrete, and glass materials. The structure is surrounded by mature trees and landscaped grounds, including paved walkways and a patio area. The facade combines horizontal wooden paneling with white and gray concrete, and large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the building. The rooftop includes a terrace with railings and geometric cutouts, adding to the contemporary aesthetic. The entrance is sheltered by a cantilevered canopy, and the property is bordered by a low hedge and garden features. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a cylindrical tower, wood and concrete facade, large windows, and landscaped grounds with mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical tower, main entrance, and dense tree coverage partially obscuring the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage entrance, and the open terrace on the roof.
description_view_2: Direct front view with the cylindrical tower centered, clear view of the main entrance and geometric rooftop features.
description_view_3: Rear/side view showing the backyard, additional patio space, and more of the landscaped garden and trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
